# volcenginecc_iam_allowed_ip_address (Data Source)

Data Source schema for Volcengine::IAM::AllowedIpAddress



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `enable_ip_list` (Boolean) Enable IP allowlist
- `ip_list` (Attributes Set) IP allowlist list (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ip_list))
- `quota` (Number) IP allowlist quota for current identity
- `user_id` (String) Sub-user ID

<a id="nestedatt--ip_list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ip_list`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description
- `ip` (String) IP address
